headline_seed: Russia hits Kyiv with hypersonic ballistic missile in ‘deranged’ attack - The Guardian
draft_text:
#BreakingMews Russia struck Kyiv overnight with ~600 drones and 90 missiles — its third use of the Oreshnik hypersonic missile in this war. NBC News and NPR report Ukrainian air defenses intercepted 549 drones and 55 missiles.

And that's the mews.
